config.name: FTH Reserve Stress — Calm (shock=0.001)
config.hypothesis: Under calm market conditions (shock=0.001), aggressive treasury deployment outperforms hoarding with minimal downside risk

findings: Optimal treasury threshold by fitness: 0.10 (mean fitness: 0.5458) at shock=0.001
Peak population stability at threshold = 0.90 (mean pop: 49.9)
Treasury ratio: 0.0008 at deployment (0.10) vs 0.0091 at hoarding (0.90)
No collapses observed across entire threshold range
Mean catastrophe deaths: 1.9 at deployment vs 1.9 at hoarding
Population volatility: 6.87 at deployment vs 6.79 at hoarding
